Base Offset:

Size:

Source:

Description

Read engine AXI monitor error selection and filtering

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:16] RSVD2 r 0x0 -
[15:8] ERR_MASK rw 0xff -
[7:4] RSVD1 r 0x0 -
[3:0] ERR_SELECT rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD2

Reserved

ERR_MASK

Error mask [15:8] - error type filtering

RSVD1

Reserved

ERR_SELECT

Error select [3:0] - error type selection
